name: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares ($25.00 liquidation preference per share)
summary: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust is a publicly traded REIT that focuses on opportunistic real estate investments. Based in Dallas, Texas, the company's strategy includes investments in multifamily properties, self-storage facilities, and other real estate-related assets. NXDT^A represents a series of preferred shares with specific dividend and liquidation preferences.
